template:
### Wait on Customs Payment

Please make the duty/consignment payment of **LKR {{.amount_to_pay}}** to the Customs Account.

* **Customs Account**: 1000-2026-9042 (Bank of Ceylon)
* **CusDec Number**: `{{.cusdec_number}}`

Once the payment is settled, Customs will notify the Single Window, and this task will automatically mark as completed. You do not need to upload any receipt.
